description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single deploy stage containing a pages job. The pages job runs in the deploy stage and executes the exact shell commands: mkdir public, curl https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Yonder-Dynamics/wiki-common/master/build_wiki.py | python - README.md, and find public. It publishes the public/ directory as an artifact and is configured to run only on the master branch. Use the default Docker image and no additional services.
